title: Capability
description: A Capability is a Resource:Action pair — the atomic unit of business activity. It represents a complete statement of what can happen in the domain: Loan.Approve, Order.Ship, Employee.Terminate. The Actor that performs a Capability is expressed through Rules (access) and Tasks (assignment), not on the Capability itself.

resource.description: The Resource this capability belongs to.

action.description: The Action to be performed on the Resource.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this capability represents.

examples.name: Order.Ship
examples.description: Ships a fulfilled order to the customer.
